languages.text: Эта колония — след жадной руки Империума, заклеймивший собой очередную планету во славу Императора. Запершиеся в прочных укреплениях люди цепко укрепились на этой земле и уже алчно смотрят в сторону близлежащих систем.

traits.locale_text: Эта колония — след жадной руки Империума, заклеймивший собой очередную планету во славу Императора. Запершиеся в прочных укреплениях люди цепко укрепились на этой земле и уже алчно смотрят в сторону близлежащих систем.

Эта колония — след жадной руки Империума, заклеймивший собой очередную планету во славу Императора. Запершиеся в прочных укреплениях люди цепко укрепились на этой земле и уже алчно смотрят в сторону близлежащих систем.

languages.text: This colony is yet another testament to the Imperium's greed which claimed so many worlds for the Emperor's glory. Its citizens feel secure in their reinforced fortresses and are already greedily setting their gaze on other nearby worlds.
languages.original_text: Эта колония — след жадной руки Империума, заклеймивший собой очередную планету во славу Императора. Запершиеся в прочных укреплениях люди цепко укрепились на этой земле и уже алчно смотрят в сторону близлежащих систем.

traits.locale_text: This colony is yet another testament to the Imperium's greed that claimed so many worlds for The Emperor's glory. Its citizens feel secure in their reinforced forts and are turning their gaze to another worlds to conquer.

This colony is yet another testament to the Imperium's greed which claimed so many worlds for the Emperor's glory. Its citizens feel secure in their reinforced fortresses and are already greedily setting their gaze on other nearby worlds.

languages.text: Diese Kolonie ist ein weiterer Beweis für die Gier des Imperiums, das so viele Welten für den Ruhm des Imperators erobert hat. Ihre Bürger fühlen sich in ihren verstärkten Festungen sicher und richten ihre Blicke bereits gierig auf andere nahe gelegene Welten.
languages.original_text: This colony is yet another testament to the Imperium's greed which claimed so many worlds for the Emperor's glory. Its citizens feel secure in their reinforced fortresses and are already greedily setting their gaze on other nearby worlds.

traits.locale_text: Diese Kolonie ist ein weiterer Beweis für die Gier des Imperiums, das so viele Welten für den Ruhm des Imperators erobert hat. Ihre Bürger fühlen sich in ihren verstärkten Festungen sicher und richten ihre Blicke bereits gierig auf andere nahe gelegene Welten.

languages.text: Cette colonie est un nouveau témoignage de la cupidité de l'Imperium, qui s'est emparé de tant de mondes pour la gloire de l'Empereur. Ses citoyens se sentent en sécurité dans leurs forteresses renforcées et se tournent déjà avec avidité vers d'autres mondes voisins.
languages.original_text: This colony is yet another testament to the Imperium's greed which claimed so many worlds for the Emperor's glory. Its citizens feel secure in their reinforced fortresses and are already greedily setting their gaze on other nearby worlds.

traits.locale_text: Cette colonie est un nouveau témoignage de la cupidité de l'Imperium, qui s'est emparé de tant de mondes pour la gloire de l'Empereur. Ses citoyens se sentent en sécurité dans leurs forteresses renforcées et se tournent déjà avec avidité vers d'autres mondes voisins.

languages.text: Esta colonia es un testimonio más de la codicia del Imperio, que se cobró tantos mundos para gloria del Emperador. Sus ciudadanos se sienten seguros en sus fortalezas reforzadas y ya están fijando ávidamente su mirada en otros mundos cercanos.
languages.original_text: This colony is yet another testament to the Imperium's greed which claimed so many worlds for the Emperor's glory. Its citizens feel secure in their reinforced fortresses and are already greedily setting their gaze on other nearby worlds.

traits.locale_text: Esta colonia es un testimonio más de la codicia del Imperio, que se cobró tantos mundos para gloria del Emperador. Sus ciudadanos se sienten seguros en sus fortalezas reforzadas y ya están fijando ávidamente su mirada en otros mundos cercanos.

languages.text: Bu koloni, İmparator'un ihtişamı için pek çok dünyayı ele geçiren İmparatorluğun açgözlülüğünün bir başka kanıtıdır. Vatandaşları güçlendirilmiş kalelerinde kendilerini güvende hissediyor ve şimdiden açgözlülükle gözlerini yakındaki diğer dünyalara dikmiş durumdalar.
languages.original_text: This colony is yet another testament to the Imperium's greed which claimed so many worlds for the Emperor's glory. Its citizens feel secure in their reinforced fortresses and are already greedily setting their gaze on other nearby worlds.

traits.locale_text: Bu koloni, İmparator'un ihtişamı için pek çok dünyayı ele geçiren İmparatorluğun açgözlülüğünün bir başka kanıtıdır. Vatandaşları güçlendirilmiş kalelerinde kendilerini güvende hissediyor ve şimdiden açgözlülükle gözlerini yakındaki diğer dünyalara dikmiş durumdalar.
